verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sweet Jesus my Savior you are my faithful friend You made me you know me you’ve seen my every sin

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My soul is amazed By the gift of your grace And the arms that take me Sweet Jesus my Savior you are my faithful friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Sweet Jesus my shelter you are my faithful friend The refuge I run to when the world comes closing in

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Why should I be afraid When I know I am saved By the arms that take me in Sweet Jesus my shelter you are my faithful friend

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Sweet Jesus my shepherd you are my faithful friend You hold me you lead me I’ll follow to the end

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And once more I will say On that beautiful day When your arms take me in Sweet Jesus my shepherd you are my faithful friend Sweet Jesus my Savior you are my faithful friend
